name: Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg or egg yolks with a rotary beater until slightly thick.
2. Gradually add 1 teaspoon of oil at a time, beating well after each addition, until about one-third cup has been incorporated.
3. Add a few drops of lemon juice or vinegar.
4. The mixture should be quite thick and perfectly smooth. If it isn't, you added the oil too quickly or didn't beat it enough.
5. Continue to add the oil and acid alternately until all the oil is used up.
6. Add seasonings to taste.
7. Store covered in the refrigerator.
